title: Seismic Folder
description: A content folder in the Seismic platform used to organize content items in a hierarchical structure.

parentId.description: ID of the parent folder. Null for root-level folders.

path.description: Full path of the folder in the folder hierarchy.

contentCount.description: Number of content items in the folder.

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the folder.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the folder was created.

modifiedBy.description: ID of the user who last modified the folder.

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the folder was last modified.
